zh.lifeSummary: 當Guermond de Picquigny I於大約1070年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼時，他的父親Comte Eustache de Picquigny31歲，母親Adele de Ponthieu36歲。他和Béatrice de Daours至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他於1123年在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس被列為régent du royaume de jérusalem。他去世於大約1131年在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農希頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guermond de Picquigny I于大约1070年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼时，他的父亲Comte Eustache de Picquigny31岁，母亲Adele de Ponthieu36岁。他和Béatrice de Daours至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他于1123年在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس被列为régent du royaume de jérusalem。他去世于大约1131年在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農希頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guermond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Germund, composed of the elements gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’ + mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Germaine
meanings: Feminine form of the rarer French masculine name Germain (Late Latin Germanus ‘brother’ the original reference may have been to the concept of Christian brotherhood). Germaine Cousin ( c.1579–1601 ) was a Provençal saint, the daughter of a poor farmer. Her canonization in 1867 gave an additional impulse to the use of the name in France, from where it was imported into the English‐speaking world. This form of the name is now also used occasionally as a boy's name. See also Jermaine .

variants.name: Germundson
meanings: Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Germundsson: patronymic from the personal name Germund (see Germond ).

en.lifeSummary: When Guermond de Picquigny I was born about 1070, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, was 31 and his mother, Adele de Ponthieu, was 36. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Béatrice de Daours. In 1123, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as régent du royaume de jérusalem in Jerusalem, Ottoman Empire. He died about 1131, in Sidon, South Lebanon, Lebanon, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guermond de Picquigny I est né environ 1070, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adele de Ponthieu, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Béatrice de Daours. En 1123, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est régent du royaume de jérusalem à Jerusalem, Empire ottoman. Il est décédé environ 1131, à Saïda, Liban-Sud, Liban, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guermond de Picquigny I um 1070 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Eustache de Picquigny 31 und seine Mutter Adele de Ponthieu 36. Er hatte mit Béatrice de Daours mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1123, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als régent du royaume de jérusalem in Jerusalem, Osmanisches Reich aufgeführt. Er starb um 1131 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Saïda, Liban-Sud, Libanon.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guermond de Picquigny I è nato il circa 1070 nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Ponthieu, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Béatrice de Daours. Nel 1123, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come régent du royaume de jérusalem nel Jerusalem, Impero ottomano. Morì circa 1131, nel Saïda, Liban-Sud, Libano, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guermond de Picquigny Iが約1070年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Comte Eustache de Picquignyは31歳，母Adele de Ponthieuは36歳であった。彼はBéatrice de Daoursとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1123年，54歳の時，オスマン帝国القُدسでの職業はrégent du royaume de jérusalemと記録されている。彼は約1131年にレバノンソウス レバノンシドンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guermond de Picquigny I(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Eustache de Picquigny(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Ponthieu(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Béatrice de Daours(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1123년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه القُدس에서 régent du royaume de jérusalem이었다. 그는 대략 1131년 레바논 소우스 레바넌 시던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.environ 1070–environ 1131: tany ho any amin'ny 1070–tany ho any amin'ny 1131

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guermond de Picquigny I nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Ponthieu, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Béatrice de Daours. Em 1123, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como régent du royaume de jérusalem em Jerusalem, Império Otomano. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1131, em Saïda, Liban-Sud, Líbano, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guermond de Picquigny I родился около 1070 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Eustache de Picquigny было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adele de Ponthieu, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Béatrice de Daours. В 1123 году, в возрасте 54 лет,  он работал по профессии régent du royaume de jérusalem в местности القُدس, Османская империя. Он умер около 1131 г. в местности сидон, соут лебанон, Ливан в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.environ 1070–environ 1131: e tusa o le 1070–e tusa o le 1131

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guermond de Picquigny I nació aproximadamente 1070, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adele de Ponthieu, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Béatrice de Daours. En 1123, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era régent du royaume de jérusalem en Jerusalem, Imperio otomano. Murió aproximadamente 1131, en Saïda, Liban-Sud, Líbano, a la edad de 63 años.
